title: Beware the Fog
description: There's something lurking in the fog
body:
There's something lurking in the fog. BEWARE! This modpack includes a collection of popular mods to improve the game experience (optimization mods, QoL Features like Essentials), and some mods to achieve a Horror setting (From the fog, Graveyard and many others!). This modpack also comes with Insanity & Spooklementary Shaders pre-installed, to help with the overall lightning and mood. PS: More mods, texture packs, shaders will be added in future updates.
